title: Questions about Minna No Eva Fan
display_title: Questions about Minna No Eva Fan
wikitext:
[]: Questions about Minna No Eva Fan             Quote Post by cyharding » Sun Jun 22, 2014 10:15 pm I don't know if this thread should belong here or in ChitChat, so it any mod or admin thinks it needs to be moved, please do. For a while now, I've been wondering about the Minna No Eva Fan site. I have been noticing that it is often the first source for any major news whether it is about Rebuild or the manga or about the newsest piece of merchandise. But I would like to know what is the story about this blog. Is it run by a private individual or is it run by someone connected to Gainax or Khara? If anyone had those answers, it would be appreciated.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Mon Jun 23, 2014 12:27 am I was always under the impression it was just some random who's built the blog up into what it is over time, eventually pulling enough traffic to host ads and what-not.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 23, 2014 12:37 am That's what I understood, too. Random Japanese fan (pretty sure it's one guy) who built the site up over time.

For a while now, I've been wondering about the Minna No Eva Fan site. I have been noticing that it is often the first source for any major news whether it is about Rebuild or the manga or about the newsest piece of merchandise. But I would like to know what is the story about this blog. Is it run by a private individual or is it run by someone connected to Gainax or Khara? If anyone had those answers, it would be appreciated.
